title: carduus thracicus
intro: Carduus thracicus, also known as Thrace thistle, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immune-boosting effects. The health benefits of Carduus thracicus are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, typically combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
